headline: Morgan Stanley Raises its Price Target on Hewlett Packard (HPE)
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (NYSE:HPE) is one of the 10 Best Data Center Stocks with Huge Upside Potential. On May 21, 2026, Morgan Stanley analyst Erik Woodring raised the firm’s price target on Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (NYSE:HPE) to $33 from $25 and maintained an Equal Weight rating on the shares.
